'''zhatupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignomy|ignomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignomy|ignomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhatupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhætipith|zhætipith]] || [[word:zhætipij|zhætipij]] || [[word:zhætipish|zhætipish]] || [[word:zhætipi|zhætipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatutuputh|zhatutuputh]] || [[word:zhatutupuj|zhatutupuj]] || [[word:zhatutupush|zhatutupush]] || [[word:zhatutupu|zhatutupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatuputh|zhatuputh]] || [[word:zhatupuj|zhatupuj]] || [[word:zhatupush|zhatupush]] || [[word:zhatupu|zhatupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatufputh|zhatufputh]] || [[word:zhatufpuj|zhatufpuj]] || [[word:zhatufpush|zhatufpush]] || [[word:zhatufpuf|zhatufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatuputhu|zhatuputhu]] || [[word:zhatupuju|zhatupuju]] || [[word:zhatupushu|zhatupushu]] || [[word:zhatupuku|zhatupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatuputh|zhatuputh]] || [[word:zhatupuj|zhatupuj]] || [[word:zhatupush|zhatupush]] || [[word:zhatupu|zhatupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatuputhul|zhatuputhul]] || [[word:zhatupujul|zhatupujul]] || [[word:zhatupushul|zhatupushul]] || [[word:zhatupukul|zhatupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatuputhuthu|zhatuputhuthu]] || [[word:zhatupujuju|zhatupujuju]] || [[word:zhatupushushu|zhatupushushu]] || [[word:zhatupuku|zhatupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatuputhun|zhatuputhun]] || [[word:zhatupujun|zhatupujun]] || [[word:zhatupushun|zhatupushun]] || [[word:zhatupukun|zhatupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatuputhuoro|zhatuputhuoro]] || [[word:zhatupujuoro|zhatupujuoro]] || [[word:zhatupushuoro|zhatupushuoro]] || [[word:zhatupukuoro|zhatupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
